sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array_map (id UInt32, values Array(Int32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, arrayMap(x -> (x * 2), values) AS doubled_values FROM test_array_map;
UPDATE test_array_map SET values = arrayMap(x -> (x + 3), values) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayMap((x, y) -> (x + y), values, [1, 0, -1]) AS combined_values FROM test_array_map;
